violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a strainer and food debris within the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. The strainer was removed from the sink basin at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment shall add an indicating symbol to menu for food items that are offered raw or undercooked. Per PIC, symbols will be added when menus are reprinted. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025
Proper handwashing signage was lacking at all kitchen handsinks. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off during time of inspection. Staff was actively cleaning ice machine during time of inspection. Ice machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
A proper air gap is lacking at the food prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
3 bay sink was observed leaking from drainage pipes during time of inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
